array.string: unset CLAUDECODE; cd "/Users/openclaw/Library/Mobile Documents/com~apple~CloudDocs/FreeMyMemories/_paperclip"; NODE=/Users/openclaw/homebrew/bin/node; if ! $NODE -e "const f=require('fs').readFileSync('server/src/services/heartbeat.ts','utf8'); if(!f.includes('wakeOnComment')){process.exit(1)}" 2>/dev/null; then echo "FATAL: wakeOnComment patch (e855c890) missing from Paperclip. Rebase the freemymemories/local-customizations branch. See _paperclip/CUSTOMIZATIONS.md" >&2; exit 1; fi; if ! $NODE -e "const f=require('fs').readFileSync('server/src/adapters/registry.ts','utf8'); if(!f.includes('supportsLocalAgentJwt: true')){process.exit(1)}" 2>/dev/null; then echo "FATAL: supportsLocalAgentJwt patch (4ac66f9d) missing from registry.ts. Rebase the freemymemories/local-customizations branch. See _paperclip/CUSTOMIZATIONS.md" >&2; exit 1; fi; if ! $NODE -e "const f=require('fs').readFileSync('server/src/services/activity-log.ts','utf8'); if(!f.includes('eventType: \"activity.logged\"')){process.exit(1)}" 2>/dev/null; then echo "FATAL: activity.logged emit patch (d5573660) missing from activity-log.ts. Plugins subscribed to activity.logged will receive nothing. See _paperclip/CUSTOMIZATIONS.md" >&2; exit 1; fi; if ! $NODE -e "const f=require('fs').readFileSync('server/src/services/plugin-tool-dispatcher.ts','utf8'); if(!f.includes('pluginDbId?: string')){process.exit(1)}" 2>/dev/null; then echo "FATAL: pluginDbId signature patch (9527fa37) missing from plugin-tool-dispatcher.ts. Every plugin tool call will return 502. See _paperclip/CUSTOMIZATIONS.md" >&2; exit 1; fi; if ! $NODE -e "if(!require('fs').existsSync('scripts/dev-runner-paths.mjs')){process.exit(1)}" 2>/dev/null; then echo "FATAL: dev-runner-paths.mjs (6fb9f642) missing. tsx watch will restart on every iCloud metadata tickle. See _paperclip/CUSTOMIZATIONS.md" >&2; exit 1; fi; if ! $NODE -e "const f=require('fs').readFileSync('server/src/services/heartbeat.ts','utf8'); if(!f.includes('emitRunStatusPluginEvent')){process.exit(1)}" 2>/dev/null; then echo "FATAL: heartbeat plugin-event emit patch missing from heartbeat.ts. Rebase the freemymemories/local-customizations branch. See _paperclip/CUSTOMIZATIONS.md" >&2; exit 1; fi; export BETTER_AUTH_SECRET=b7e3da3cb84d76906bb59c76c071a55fcfcdbce59884362ee2685d43d16c3ecf; export BETTER_AUTH_BASE_URL=http://localhost:3100; /Users/openclaw/homebrew/bin/pnpm dev --tailscale-auth
